title: IT Product Manager – Customer Centricity (m/f/d)
required_skills: 4-6 years IT Product Management in customer-centric/Customer Service environment
End-to-end IT product ownership across full lifecycle
Customer Service digitalization and automation initiatives
Enterprise Customer Service platforms (case management, ticketing)
IT governance, GDPR, data protection standards
Degree in Information Technology, Computer Science or Business Informatics
matched_skills: Cross-functional stakeholder coordination: HSBC programme coordination
Reporting and data storytelling: HSBC executive dashboards, Hapag-Lloyd customer journey analytics
missing_skills: IT Product Management (no product ownership experience)
Enterprise Customer Service platform knowledge (ICE, case management systems)
core_responsibilities: Own and manage core Customer Service IT products end-to-end
Lead Customer Service digitalization with AI-driven automation focus
Translate business requirements into scalable IT solutions
Manage internal teams and external vendors including SLAs
Ensure compliance with IT security and data protection standards
recommended_emphasis: Hapag-Lloyd customer experience project — closest analog to customer-centric IT product context
HSBC technology programme coordination as cross-functional IT delivery experience
Vendor management experience from IPC Marketing and ECE Group
summary: Score 28.0 (poor match). This role requires deep IT Product Management expertise — specifically owning enterprise customer service platforms and AI-driven automation products — which is outside Boru's background. Boru's experience is in PMO/programme coordination, not product ownership or IT platform management. The significant skill gap in IT product management, GDPR, and AI/chatbot solutions makes this a poor fit. Not recommended without a fundamental repositioning of the candidacy.
